overview: Tidewalker Slinger is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 60 HP, 15 physical damage, 80 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Water Melee Attack at 150% ratio (225 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Land Range Attack2 (0%), Water Melee Attack (150%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
